---
title: "04_combine"
author: "Vinci Chan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc_expand: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# 1. Setup

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)
library(lubridate)
library(future)
library(furrr)
library(arrow)

source("R/config.R")
source("R/utils_db.R")
```

# 2. Get file paths

```{r}
sqlite_files <- list.files(
  cfg$sqlite_dir,
  pattern   = "\\.sqlite$",
  full.names = TRUE
) %>%
  sort()

length(sqlite_files)
head(sqlite_files)
```

# 3. Combine tables

```{r}
read_quarter_holdings <- function(sqlite_path) {
  yq <- basename(sqlite_path) %>%
    str_remove("\\.sqlite$") %>%
    as.integer()

  year <- yq %/% 10
  qtr  <- yq %% 10

  if (!(qtr %in% 1:4)) {
    warning("Invalid quarter in file: ", sqlite_path, immediate. = FALSE)
    return(tibble())
  }

  con <- dbConnect(SQLite(), sqlite_path)
  on.exit(dbDisconnect(con), add = TRUE)

  if (!dbExistsTable(con, "holdings_table_parsed")) {
    return(tibble())
  }

  df <- dbReadTable(con, "holdings_table_parsed") %>% as_tibble()

  df %>%
    mutate(
      year_qtr = yq,
      year = year,
      qtr = qtr,
      quarter_label = paste0(year, " Q", qtr),
      quarter_date = case_when(
        qtr == 1 ~ ymd(paste0(year, "-02-15")),
        qtr == 2 ~ ymd(paste0(year, "-05-15")),
        qtr == 3 ~ ymd(paste0(year, "-08-15")),
        qtr == 4 ~ ymd(paste0(year, "-11-15"))
      )
    )
}
```

```{r}
plan(multisession)

all_holdings <- future_map_dfr(
  sqlite_files,
  read_quarter_holdings,
  .progress = TRUE
)

plan(sequential)
gc()

nrow(all_holdings)
n_distinct(all_holdings$year_qtr)
n_distinct(all_holdings$filename)
```

```{r}
# write to parquet (for downstream cleaning and analysis)
write_parquet(
  all_holdings,
  file.path(cfg$derived_dir, "all_holdings.parquet")
)
```

```{r}
# quick QA check
all_holdings %>%
  count(year_qtr, quarter_label, sort = FALSE)
```
